title: pinguicula × hybrida
intro: Pinguicula × hybrida is a hybrid carnivorous plant, specifically a cross between two species of Pinguicula, which are also known as butterworts. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pinguicula × hybrida include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be carefully considered due to limited scientific research on its effects in humans.
